title: trifolium orbelicum
intro: Trifolium orbelicum is a species of perennial herb belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae), native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Trifolium orbelicum include its anti-diarrheal and anti-spasmodic effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and other gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Trifolium orbelicum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various gastrointestinal conditions.
